data.description:

Xin Yuan Enterprises Group Ltd. ( (HK:1748) ) has provided an announcement.

Xin Yuan Enterprises Group Ltd. has called an extraordinary general meeting for 8 May 2026 in Hong Kong to seek shareholder approval for the appointment of Prism Hong Kong Limited as its new auditor. The proposed auditor would serve until the conclusion of the company’s next annual general meeting, with the board authorized to set its remuneration, signaling a planned change in the company’s external audit arrangements and potentially reflecting evolving governance or compliance priorities.

The company has set 8 May 2026 as the record date for determining shareholders’ eligibility to attend and vote, and its register of members will be closed from 5 to 8 May 2026 for share transfer processing. Shareholders may appoint one or more proxies to vote on their behalf, and specific procedural requirements for proxy submission and joint shareholdings have been outlined, underscoring the firm’s adherence to formal corporate meeting and voting protocols.

More about Xin Yuan Enterprises Group Ltd.

Xin Yuan Enterprises Group Ltd., incorporated in the Cayman Islands and listed in Hong Kong, operates with principal offices in mainland China and Hong Kong. The company is governed by a board comprising executive and independent non-executive directors, reflecting a conventional corporate governance structure for a Hong Kong-listed enterprise.

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

data.title: Newborn Town Posts Double-Digit Q1 Revenue Growth on AI-Driven Expansion
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Newborn Town Inc. ( (HK:9911) ) has shared an announcement.

Newborn Town Inc. reported strong unaudited growth for the first quarter of 2026, with total revenue expected between RMB2.03 billion and RMB2.13 billion, up about 33% to 39.6% year on year. The group’s social networking business remained its core revenue driver, with cumulative downloads rising to roughly 1.02 billion and average monthly active users reaching about 35.9 million, supporting an estimated segment revenue increase of 31.3% to 37.2%.

Management attributed the sustained expansion of the social networking division to continued global rollout and the deployment of AI across its value chain, which bolstered performance of flagship products. Its innovative business, led by an AI-driven short drama segment, delivered particularly rapid growth, with revenue projected at RMB245 million to RMB265 million, a year-on-year increase of about 46.7% to 58.7%, underscoring the company’s intensifying push into new digital content verticals.

More about Newborn Town Inc.

Newborn Town Inc. is a Cayman Islands-incorporated company listed in Hong Kong that operates primarily in social networking and related digital entertainment services. The group focuses on global expansion of its social platforms and is also cultivating innovative, AI-driven businesses such as short drama content, targeting international user growth and diversified revenue streams.

data.title: Chow Tai Fook Balances Mainland Slowdown With Surging Hong Kong and Macao Sales
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Chow Tai Fook Jewellery Group ( (HK:1929) ) has shared an update.

Chow Tai Fook Jewellery Group reported a 1.5% decline in group retail sales value for the quarter ended 31 March 2026, as weaker performance in the Chinese Mainland offset a strong rebound in Hong Kong and Macao. Same-store sales in self-operated Mainland stores were broadly stable, while franchised outlets fell, but Hong Kong and Macao posted robust year-on-year same-store growth on the back of improved consumer sentiment and traffic.

Despite softer volumes, average selling prices for both weight-based gold and fixed-price jewellery rose significantly across all markets, reflecting firm pricing amid high and volatile gold prices. The company continued its brand transformation by rolling out higher-productivity newly designed stores, opening new outlets in Bangkok and Sydney, unveiling its largest flagship store on Canton Road in Hong Kong, and broadening its lifestyle reach with the launch of CTF Accessories and CTF HOME.

The most recent analyst rating on (HK:1929) stock is a Buy with a HK$16.10 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Chow Tai Fook Jewellery Group stock, see the HK:1929 Stock Forecast page.

More about Chow Tai Fook Jewellery Group

Chow Tai Fook Jewellery Group is a Hong Kong–based jewellery retailer operating across the Chinese Mainland, Hong Kong, Macao and selected overseas markets. The group focuses on gold and gem-set jewellery, including both weight-based and fixed-price products, and is positioning itself as a global Chinese luxury brand through store upgrades and international expansion.

data.description:

BYD Co ( (HK:1211) ) has shared an update.

BYD Company Limited has called its annual general meeting for 9 June 2026 in Shenzhen, where shareholders will vote on routine corporate matters including approval of the 2025 board report, audited financial statements, annual report and profit distribution plan. The meeting will also consider the appointment of Ernst & Young Hua Ming as sole external and internal control auditor for 2026, and authorise a substantial guarantee framework of up to RMB150 billion for credit support to its subsidiaries and investee entities, which could enhance financing flexibility across its global operations while remaining subject to Chinese regulatory constraints.

The proposed guarantees include cross-guarantees among domestic and overseas subsidiaries and support for investee companies, with specific caps based on subsidiaries’ gearing ratios and requirements for counter-guarantees to mitigate risk. BYD stresses it has no plan to extend guarantees to directors, senior management or unrelated parties, aiming to balance expanded financial support for its core business network with defined risk controls for shareholders and creditors.

The most recent analyst rating on (HK:1211) stock is a Buy with a HK$22.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on BYD Co stock, see the HK:1211 Stock Forecast page.

More about BYD Co

BYD Company Limited is a Chinese joint stock company based in Shenzhen, operating primarily in the automotive and new energy sectors. Listed in Hong Kong with HKD and RMB counters, the group focuses on electric vehicles, batteries and related technologies, serving both domestic and international markets.

The latest announcement is out from Tiande Chemical Holdings Limited ( (HK:0609) ).

Tiande Chemical Holdings Limited has convened its annual general meeting for 5 June 2026 in Hong Kong, where shareholders will review the audited financial statements for the year ended 31 December 2025 and vote on a proposed final dividend of HK$0.03 per share. The agenda also includes re-election of one executive, one non-executive and one independent non-executive director, re-appointment of BDO Limited as auditor, and approval of a general mandate allowing the board to issue up to 20% of existing share capital, with a potential extension tied to any share repurchases.

The proposed dividend signals the company’s intention to return cash to shareholders following its 2025 performance, while the re-election of directors and auditor underscores continuity in governance and oversight. The share issuance mandate, a common practice among Hong Kong-listed companies, would give the board flexibility to raise equity capital for future funding needs or strategic initiatives, potentially affecting share dilution and capital structure for existing investors.

data.title: China Jinmao Reclassifies Xi’an Huimao Loans as Continuing Connected Transaction
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

China Jinmao Holdings Group Limited ( (HK:0817) ) has issued an announcement.

China Jinmao said its indirect non-wholly owned subsidiary Xi’an Huimao has entered into a framework agreement to extend loans to its three shareholders, Xi’an Xiangmao, Qujiang Holdings and Shaanxi Local Power Aerospace Real Estate, in proportion to their equity stakes and on identical terms. The loans will be documented in separate agreements, with each borrower or its designated entity receiving financing aligned with its shareholding ratio in Xi’an Huimao.

Following the strong 2025 performance of Xi’an Huimao, its profit and revenue contribution exceeded the 5% threshold under Hong Kong listing rules, meaning the unit is no longer deemed an insignificant subsidiary. As a result, Qujiang Holdings and Shaanxi Local Power Aerospace Real Estate are now classified as connected persons at the subsidiary level, and the loan arrangement has become a continuing connected transaction subject to disclosure, annual review and other compliance requirements under Chapter 14A.

The most recent analyst rating on (HK:0817) stock is a Buy with a HK$1.70 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on China Jinmao Holdings Group Limited stock, see the HK:0817 Stock Forecast page.

More about China Jinmao Holdings Group Limited

China Jinmao Holdings Group Limited is a Hong Kong–incorporated real estate group engaged in property development and related investment activities in mainland China. The company operates through various subsidiaries and joint ventures, focusing on large-scale urban projects and property investment platforms that contribute meaningfully to its consolidated revenue and profit.

data.title: Breton Technology Dilutes Stake in Energy-Saving Unit via Connected Capital Increase
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Breton Technology Co., Ltd. Class H ( (HK:1333) ) just unveiled an update.

Breton Technology Co., Ltd. has entered into a connected capital increase transaction involving its non-wholly owned subsidiary Breton Intelligent Power and indirect subsidiary Breton Energy Saving. Three individual investors, including controlling shareholder and director Chen Fangming, will inject a total of RMB38 million in cash, raising Breton Energy Saving’s registered capital from RMB12 million to RMB50 million.

Following the capital injection, Breton Intelligent Power’s stake in Breton Energy Saving will be diluted from 100% to 24%, meaning Breton Energy Saving will cease to be a subsidiary and will be deconsolidated from the group’s financial statements. The deal is classified as a connected transaction and a deemed disposal under Hong Kong listing rules, triggering reporting and announcement obligations but exempting the company from circular issuance and independent shareholders’ approval, thereby streamlining execution while altering the group’s corporate and financial structure.

More about Breton Technology Co., Ltd. Class H

Breton Technology Co., Ltd. is a China-based company listed in Hong Kong that operates through subsidiaries such as Breton Intelligent Power and Breton Energy Saving, focusing on intelligent power and energy-saving technologies. Its business structure involves multiple indirect holdings, indicating a diversified presence in the broader power and energy efficiency sector.

data.title: Sino Biopharm Unit LaNova Unveils Promising ADC Data at AACR 2026
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Sino Biopharmaceutical ( (HK:1177) ) has issued an announcement.

Sino Biopharmaceutical’s wholly owned unit LaNova Medicines has showcased new preclinical data on two antibody-drug conjugates, LM-364 and LM-338, at the American Association for Cancer Research Annual Meeting 2026, underscoring its push into next-generation oncology biologics. The programs target solid tumors with technologies aimed at improving tumor selectivity and safety profiles, reinforcing the group’s positioning in high-value cancer therapeutics.

LM-364, a Nectin-4 tumor microenvironment-activated ADC, demonstrated strong antitumor activity across multiple patient-derived xenograft models and a favorable safety profile in animal studies, and has already progressed to an IND filing with the U.S. FDA ahead of a planned first-in-human trial in 2026. LM-338, designed as a potential first-in-class ADC against the tumor-specific STn glycan antigen, showed high target specificity and efficient internalization, signaling future pipeline expansion in solid tumor indications if later-stage data confirm these preclinical results.

The most recent analyst rating on (HK:1177) stock is a Buy with a HK$8.70 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Sino Biopharmaceutical stock, see the HK:1177 Stock Forecast page.

More about Sino Biopharmaceutical

Sino Biopharmaceutical Limited is a China-focused pharmaceutical company engaged in the research, development, manufacturing, and commercialization of innovative therapies, with a strong emphasis on oncology. Through subsidiaries such as LaNova Medicines, it develops advanced antibody-drug conjugates and other targeted treatments for solid tumors and other cancers.

The latest update is out from Anhui Jinyan Kaolin New Materials Co. Ltd. Class H ( (HK:2693) ).

Anhui Jinyan Kaolin New Materials has revised and reissued details of its final cash dividend for the year ended 31 December 2025, declaring a payout of RMB 2.27 per 10 shares, with Hong Kong holders to receive HKD 2.590632 per 10 shares based on an exchange rate of RMB 1 to HKD 1.141248. The dividend, approved on 21 April 2026, will trade ex-dividend on 23 April, use 25 April as the record date, and be paid on 22 May, with the company outlining differentiated withholding tax arrangements for non-resident individual H-shareholders depending on their tax treaty status with the PRC, which clarifies after-tax returns and compliance obligations for overseas investors.

The announcement specifies a book closure period from 25 to 30 April 2026 and confirms Computershare Hong Kong Investor Services as the share registrar handling entitlement registration. By providing precise currency conversion, key timetable dates, and detailed tax withholding rates ranging from 10% to 20% for various non-resident categories, the company enhances transparency around shareholder distributions and signals continued commitment to returning cash to investors while adhering to PRC tax regulations.

More about Anhui Jinyan Kaolin New Materials Co. Ltd. Class H

Anhui Jinyan Kaolin New Materials Co., Ltd. is a Hong Kong-listed producer of kaolin-based new materials, serving industrial customers that use kaolin and related products in manufacturing and construction applications. An update from Li Ning Company ( (HK:2331) ) is now available.

Li Ning reported that retail sell-through for its LI-NING branded points of sale in China, excluding LI-NING YOUNG, grew by a mid-single-digit percentage year-on-year in the first quarter of 2026. Offline channels saw mid-single-digit growth, driven by low-teens gains in directly operated retail stores and a low-single-digit increase in franchised wholesale outlets, while e-commerce posted high-single-digit growth.

As of 31 March 2026, the number of LI-NING points of sale in China stood at 6,075, reflecting a modest net reduction of 16 locations since the start of the year as store rationalization in direct retail outweighed expansion in wholesale. The LI-NING YOUNG network shrank by 54 to 1,464 locations, underscoring a continued optimization of the store portfolio even as overall sell-through improves, and the company cautioned investors that the disclosed figures are unaudited operational data that may be adjusted.

data.title: Alphamab’s KN026 Breast Cancer Trial Secures High-Profile ASCO 2026 Slot
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Alphamab Oncology ( (HK:9966) ) has issued an update.

Alphamab Oncology announced that phase III trial results for KN026, its anti-HER2 bispecific antibody co-developed with CSPC subsidiary JMT-Bio, in combination with albumin-bound docetaxel HB1801 as neoadjuvant therapy for HER2-positive breast cancer, have been selected for a Late-Breaking Abstract oral presentation at the 2026 ASCO Annual Meeting. The head-to-head study showed KN026 plus HB1801 significantly improved total pathological complete response versus the current standard regimen of trastuzumab, pertuzumab and docetaxel, suggesting the regimen could become a new standard of care and reinforcing Alphamab’s position in HER2-targeted oncology, while KN026 continues to advance through multiple registrational trials in breast and gastric cancers with regulatory designations in China and the U.S.

The most recent analyst rating on (HK:9966) stock is a Buy with a HK$9.60 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Alphamab Oncology stock, see the HK:9966 Stock Forecast page.

More about Alphamab Oncology

Alphamab Oncology is a China-based biopharmaceutical company focused on developing innovative oncology therapies, including bispecific antibodies such as KN026. The company targets cancers driven by HER2 and other biomarkers, with a growing portfolio of late-stage clinical programs and partnerships that emphasize both domestic and international commercialization opportunities.

An update from Beijing Fourth Paradigm Technology Co. Ltd. Class H ( (HK:6682) ) is now available.

Phancy Group Co., Ltd. has entered into a placing agreement with a syndicate of placing agents to issue up to 38.8 million new H shares at HK$40.36 each under its existing general mandate. The placing shares represent about 12.09% of issued H shares and 7.47% of total issued shares before the deal, and about 10.79% and 6.95% respectively after completion, with all placees required to be independent third parties.

The transaction is expected to raise gross proceeds of approximately HK$1,565.97 million and net proceeds of about HK$1,555.63 million, implying a net placing price of roughly HK$40.09 per share. Priced at a discount to recent five-day and last-trading-day closes but at a premium to the 30-day average, the deal allows the company to rapidly bolster its capital base without additional shareholder approval, potentially strengthening its financial flexibility and market positioning, subject to listing approval for the new shares in Hong Kong.

More about Beijing Fourth Paradigm Technology Co. Ltd. Class H

Phancy Group Co., Ltd., formerly known as Beijing Fourth Paradigm Technology Co., Ltd., is a joint stock company incorporated in the People’s Republic of China and listed in Hong Kong under stock code 6682. The company issues H shares to international investors via the Hong Kong Stock Exchange, using capital markets to support its business expansion and corporate development.

data.title: Greatview Swings to Quarterly Loss as Costs Rise Amid Ongoing Trading Suspension
data.description:

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Greatview Aseptic Packaging Company ( (HK:0468) ) has provided an update.

Greatview Aseptic Packaging Company reported unaudited management accounts for the three months ended 31 March 2026, showing revenue of RMB396.8 million, down slightly from RMB415.2 million a year earlier. The group swung to a net loss of RMB7.7 million from a profit of RMB43.1 million, pressured by higher administrative expenses, reduced other income, adverse movements in other gains, and the absence of prior-year associate profits.

The company said the disclosure aims to keep shareholders and potential investors informed of its operational and financial position while trading in its shares remains suspended on the Hong Kong Stock Exchange. The results highlight a deterioration in profitability despite relatively stable sales, underscoring margin and cost challenges that may weigh on investor sentiment and the company’s near-term financial flexibility.

More about Greatview Aseptic Packaging Company

Greatview Aseptic Packaging Company Limited is a Hong Kong-listed manufacturer of aseptic packaging solutions, primarily serving the beverage and liquid food industries. The group operates through subsidiaries and targets customers requiring sterile, shelf-stable packaging, positioning itself within the broader food and beverage packaging supply chain.

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: HK$3.52B

data.title: Greatview Aseptic Packaging Proposes Final Dividend for 2025
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Greatview Aseptic Packaging Company ( (HK:0468) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Greatview Aseptic Packaging Company Limited has proposed a final ordinary dividend of HKD 0.006 per share for the financial year ended 31 December 2025, subject to shareholder approval on 23 June 2026. The dividend, payable in Hong Kong dollars with an ex-dividend date of 30 June 2026 and payment scheduled for 6 August 2026, signals ongoing capital returns to shareholders and provides income visibility for investors while underscoring the company’s commitment to shareholder remuneration.

The entitlement to the dividend will be determined based on a record date of 7 July 2026, following a book closure period from 3 July to 7 July 2026 administered by Tricor Investor Services Limited as share registrar. The announcement, which also confirms the current composition of the board with a mix of executive, non-executive, and independent non-executive directors, highlights a stable governance structure supporting the company’s dividend policy and investor confidence.

More about Greatview Aseptic Packaging Company

Greatview Aseptic Packaging Company Limited operates in the packaging industry, focusing on aseptic packaging solutions for liquid food and beverage producers. Listed in Hong Kong under stock code 00468, the company serves brand owners that require shelf-stable, hygienic packaging formats and competes in a global market for food-grade packaging materials and related services.

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: HK$3.52B
